name: Poulet Aux Champignons
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts without skin or bones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together 2 teaspoons of flour with sour cream, Dijon mustard, and 2 tablespoons of chicken stock. Set aside.
2. Season one side of the chicken breasts with thyme, salt, and pepper.
3. Place the remaining flour in a dish and coat all chicken breasts.
4. In a non-stick skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat. Add chicken breasts and cook for 5 minutes on each side or until no longer pink. Remove chicken breasts and keep warm.
5. In the same skillet, add mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 minutes. Add the remaining chicken stock and bring to a boil for 3 minutes.
6. Using a whisk, add the sour cream mixture previously prepared. Add green onions and cook for another 3 minutes or until thickened.
7. At serving time, top with sauce and garnish with fresh parsley.
